name: Millennium-Eyes Restrict
name_jp: ミレニアム・アイズ・サクリファイス
desc:
"Relinquished" + 1 Effect Monster
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Effect Monster in your opponent's field or GY; equip that target to this card you control. Gains ATK/DEF equal to that equipped monster's. Monsters with the same original name as that equipped monster cannot attack, also their effects are negated.
mnst_eff:
"Relinquished" + 1 Effect Monster
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Effect Monster in your opponent's field or GY; equip that target to this card you control. Gains ATK/DEF equal to that equipped monster's. Monsters with the same original name as that equipped monster cannot attack, also their effects are negated.
eff:
"Relinquished" + 1 Effect Monster
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Effect Monster in your opponent's field or GY; equip that target to this card you control. Gains ATK/DEF equal to that equipped monster's. Monsters with the same original name as that equipped monster cannot attack, also their effects are negated.

action: Equips monsters from the opponent's field to itself
Equips monsters from the opponent's Graveyard to itself
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
summoning: Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires Ritual Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires nonspecific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
